working_on.notes: Feature finalized. All integration tasks complete. Performance verified with 50k lines. UI fixes for readability and overlapping applied.

recent_changes.description: Implemented list auto-scrolling with user override detection
Added ExportLogcat logic using Wails SaveFileDialog
Fixed log entry overlapping by enforcing single-line ellipsis (title tooltip)
Enhanced combobox contrast with black text on white background

decisions_made.reason: Ensure ESM compatibility in Wails environment
Prevent O(N) layout shift in virtualized lists
Pause auto-scroll to improve readability during active debugging
